description_long: This object represents a human figure dressed in a security guard uniform, with a distinct upright torso and limbs positioned to suggest a standing posture. The uniform appears to be a light-colored shirt and dark pants, with a possible tie or badge area visible on the chest. The figure's arms are slightly bent and positioned close to the body, while the legs are spaced apart, giving a sense of alertness or readiness. The head is proportionate to the body, and there may be a cap or hat atop the head, though details are somewhat indistinct. The overall form is elongated, with exaggerated limb proportions and some surface irregularities, but the general silhouette of a uniformed security guard is clear. The surface texture is matte and the coloration is primarily gray and white, with some darker accents.
description: A uniformed security guard figure with a light shirt, dark pants, and a possible cap, standing in an alert posture with arms at the sides. The surface is matte and primarily gray and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chest, head, and both arms of the security guard, with the torso and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with the arm bent and the side of the torso visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and both legs, with the arms partially visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other arm and leg in profile, and the side of the torso and head visible.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard is wearing a standardized light-colored shirt with a dark tie or badge area, dark pants, and a possible cap, giving a formal and professional appearance typical of urban security personnel.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the sides and legs apart in an alert stance.
